title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Cello Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Cello Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cello Asia Pacific Associates:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello Asia Pacific Associates!
